occurrence_sentence: Princeton University will move its storied athletic fields to make way for the new Quantum Institute for Quantum Science and Engineering.
Matt Swayne

The Daily Princetonian has reported that both the baseball and softball teams will soon bid farewell to their current homes, as these spaces make way for the construction of the new Quantum Institute for Quantum Science and Engineering.
Campus officials also tell The Daily Princetonian that it makes sense for other reasons — and addresses the needs of a growing campus of the Ivy League school.
